payload.title: Fix RT-22: rustdoc/doc-tests bypass RUSTC_WRAPPER
payload.description: rustdoc doesn't honour RUSTC_WRAPPER, so any doc-test containing named-arg syntax fails with a plain rustc parse error. Fix options: (1) RUSTDOC_WRAPPER shim, (2) policy of banning named-arg syntax from doc-test examples, (3) strip-and-rewrite doc-tests in the mirror pass.
